title: Example module
description: Template manifest — copy to shared/modules/<name>/ when creating a module. Field keys must match types.ts and data/*.json. The web editor validates channel/role fields as Discord IDs (17–20 digit snowflakes) on save.

fields.label: Greeting message
fields.help: Supports {mention} tokens via format() in handlers.

fields.label: Target channel
fields.help: Discord channel ID (snowflake). Empty disables channel-specific behavior.
